_comment: RFC 9421 (HTTP Message Signatures) published Ed25519 test vector, vendored verbatim from the RFC text. See README.md for source and provenance. The signature_base is the §B.2.6 signature base with the RFC 8792 '\' line-wraps UNFOLDED (continuation joined, no trailing newline). signature_b64 is the §B.2.6 sig-b26 value with its line-wrap removed.
signature_base:
"date": Tue, 20 Apr 2021 02:07:55 GMT
"@method": POST
"@path": /foo
"@authority": example.com
"content-type": application/json
"content-length": 18
"@signature-params": ("date" "@method" "@path" "@authority" "content-type" "content-length");created=1618884473;keyid="test-key-ed25519"
